name: Waldorf Red Velvet Cake & Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar until fluffy.
2. Add eggs and beat for 1 minute.
3. Add salt, beating.
4. Add vanilla and red food coloring to buttermilk.
5. Alternately add flour and milk mixtures to the batter.
6. Combine baking soda and vinegar in a cup; add to the cake batter.
7. Bake in two 9-inch cake pans at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes.
8. Cool on cake racks.
9. Cook milk and flour until thick, then cool in the refrigerator.
10. Beat butter, sugar, and vanilla with a mixer.
11. Add the flour and milk mixture gradually, beating well.
